Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Microsoft Copilot Studio Release Notes

Copilot Studio is a tool for creating and maintaining copilots — AI-powered conversational interfaces based on LLMs.

## Release Timeline
Releases happen frequently with worldwide availability updates.

## Available Release Notes
| Month |
| --- |
| September 2024 |
| August 2024 |

Note: This page provides links to detailed monthly release notes. Last updated: 2024-10-08.
